title: Meowdemic
description: Meow? Meow! There's a disease going around which makes you meow like a cat...
body:
# Meowdemic

Meow? Meow! There's a disease going around which makes you meow like a cat...

## Features

- Infect your fellow ~~felines~~ humans
- Cat ears
- Meow like a cat
- Create a cure by crafting a cotton swab and using it on a dog, then craft it with some affected food items. Woof!
- A intricate gacha system designed to reflect our company values!

This mod was developed for Modfest 26.

:3
